Labs.","custom:contact":"security@morpho.orgsecurity@euler.xyzsecurity@ample.money","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"ErrorsLib","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"AboveMaxTimelock()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the submitted timelock is above the max timelock."}],"AllCapsReached()":[{"notice":"Thrown when all caps have been reached."}],"AlreadyPending()":[{"notice":"Thrown when a value is already pending."}],"AlreadySet()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the value is already set."}],"BadAssetReceiver()":[{"notice":"Thrown when withdrawal is attempted to an address known to be an EVC sub-account"}],"BadQuery()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the query is invalid."}],"BelowMinTimelock()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the submitted timelock is below the min timelock."}],"DepositMarketInWithdrawals()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the deposit vault is in `withdrawals`."}],"DuplicateMarket(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when vault is a duplicate in the new withdraw queue to set."}],"EmptyWithdrawals()":[{"notice":"Thrown when `withdrawals` is empty."}],"FeeTransferFailed(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when the fee transfer fails."}],"InconsistentAsset(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when submitting a cap for a vault whose underlying asset does not correspond to the underlying asset of the Earn vault."}],"InconsistentReallocation()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the amount withdrawn is not exactly the amount supplied."}],"InconsistentWithdrawals()":[{"notice":"Thrown when `withdrawals` contains a duplicate or is not sorted."}],"IncorrectFee()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the reallocation fee given is wrong."}],"InvalidMarketRemovalNonZeroCap(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when vault is missing in the updated withdraw queue and the vault has a non-zero cap set."}],"InvalidMarketRemovalNonZeroSupply(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when vault is missing in the updated withdraw queue and the vault has a non-zero supply."}],"InvalidMarketRemovalTimelockNotElapsed(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when vault is missing in the updated withdraw queue and the vault is not yet disabled."}],"MarketNotEnabled(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when interacting with a non previously enabled vault."}],"MaxFeeExceeded()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the fee to set exceeds the maximum fee."}],"MaxInflowExceeded(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when attempting to supply more than the max inflow of a vault."}],"MaxOutflowExceeded(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when attempting to withdraw more than the max outflow of a vault."}],"MaxQueueLengthExceeded()":[{"notice":"Thrown when too many vaults are in the withdraw queue."}],"MaxSettableFlowCapExceeded()":[{"notice":"Thrown when attempting to set max inflow/outflow above the MAX_SETTABLE_FLOW_CAP."}],"MaxUint128Exceeded()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the maximum uint128 is exceeded."}],"NoPendingValue()":[{"notice":"Thrown when there's no pending value to set."}],"NonZeroCap()":[{"notice":"Thrown when submitting a vault removal for a vault with a non zero cap."}],"NotAdminNorVaultOwner()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the `msg.sender` is not the admin nor the owner of the vault."}],"NotAllocatorRole()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the caller doesn't have the allocator role."}],"NotCuratorNorGuardianRole()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the caller doesn't have the curator nor the guardian role."}],"NotCuratorRole()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the caller doesn't have the curator role."}],"NotEnoughLiquidity()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the requested liquidity cannot be withdrawn from EulerEarn."}],"NotEnoughSupply(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when attempting to withdraw more than the available supply of a vault."}],"NotGuardianRole()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the caller doesn't have the guardian role."}],"PendingCap(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when submitting the removal of a vault when there is a cap already pending on that vault."}],"PendingRemoval()":[{"notice":"Thrown when submitting a cap for a vault with a pending removal."}],"SupplyCapExceeded(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when the supply cap has been exceeded on vault during a reallocation of funds."}],"TimelockNotElapsed()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the timelock is not elapsed."}],"UnauthorizedMarket(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when the vault cannot be set in the supply queue."}],"WithdrawZero(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when attempting to withdraw zero from a vault."}],"ZeroAddress()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the address passed is the zero address."}],"ZeroFeeRecipient()":[{"notice":"Thrown when setting the fee to a non zero value while the fee recipient is the zero address."}],"ZeroProtocolFeeRecipient()":[{"notice":"Thrown when setting the protocol fee to a non zero value while the protocol fee recipient is the zero address."}],"ZeroShares()":[{"notice":"Thrown when attempting to deposit amount of assets corresponding to zero shares."}]},"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Library exposing error
